title: PAPA SNIFFS — 'SHE'S RIGHT!'
prompt: Medium two-shot in @dentist-chair. @Sara on the LEFT lies reclined on the turquoise chair, watching with wide hopeful eyes — backup has arrived. @Papa on the RIGHT leans down from the side of the chair, takes the @gas-mask in one hand, and bravely lifts it to his own nose for a big curious sniff. His face transforms in slow-motion comedy horror — eyebrows climbing, eyes watering, cheeks puffing. Papa (one big cough): "*cough cough* — oh BOY." Papa (waving the mask away with his other hand, mock-serious to Sara): "She's RIGHT. That smells like SOCKS. We're SKIPPING the elephant." Papa (giving Sara a tiny thumbs-up): "Brave girl, no mask."
